nasb.text: When she had said this, she turned around and *saw Jesus standing there, and did not know that it was Jesus.

esv.text: Having said this, she turned around and saw Jesus standing, but she did not know that it was Jesus.

cnv.text: 馬利亞說了這話，就轉過身來，看見耶穌站在那裡，卻不知道他就是耶穌。

ccb.text: 说完，她转过身来，看见耶稣站在那里，但她不知道那就是耶稣。

csbs.text: 说了这些话，她转过身来，看见耶稣站在那里，却没有认出他就是耶稣。
